calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calender this day for Default Judgment as to Defendant Stacked Wines, LLC aka Stacked Wines LLC dba Stacked Wines adba Stacktek.

Dept.505; Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:21 a.m. and concluding at 9:26 a.m.. (D505)

Eric Jun, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. by Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Stacked Wines, LLC aka Stacked Wines LLC dba Stacked Wines adba Stacktek not appearing.
Witness for the Plaintiff Ana Simoes was placed under oath.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Money filed January 27, 2021.
Proof of Personal Service as to Defendant served February 25, 2021.
Dismissal as to Defendant Does 1 to 10 filed July 18, 2022.
Default entered as to Defendant Stacked Wines, LLC aka Stacked Wines LLC dba Stacked Wines adba Stacktek on April 2, 2021 and September 6, 2023.

The Court confirms damages, interest, attorney's fees and costs with Plaintiff. Plaintiff affirms the amount sought.

The Court rules by declaration and written statements in favor of the Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. and against Defendant Stacked Wines, LLC aka Stacked Wines LLC dba Stacked Wines adba Stacktek as follows:

Plaintiff is to recover from Defendant:

Damages $43,967.00
Interest $32,892.13
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $941.07

Proposed judgment signed and filed.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:37:58 a.m. and concluding at 10:46:51 a.m.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau appearing represented by Eric Jun Esq.
Defendant Stacked Wines, LLC. not appearing.

Plaintiff makes oral motion for continuance due to the unavailability of Plaintiff's witness.

Plaintiff's motion for continuance is GRANTED by the Court.

Court orders matter continued to June 07, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505. (D505)
